# Splitter

A resizable split panel component that allows users to adjust the size of adjacent panels by dragging a divider.

## Import

```jsx
// Nested property pattern (recommended)
import { Splitter } from "@onlinesales-ai/ui";

// Named exports (backward compatible)
import {
  Splitter,
  SplitterPanel,
  SplitterResizeTrigger,
  SplitterResizeTriggerIndicator,
  SplitterResizeTriggerSeparator,
} from "@onlinesales-ai/ui";
```

## Sub-components

| Component | Nested Property | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `Splitter` | - | The root container that manages panel sizes. |
| `SplitterPanel` | `Splitter.Panel` | An individual resizable panel. |
| `SplitterResizeTrigger` | `Splitter.ResizeTrigger` | The draggable divider between panels. |
| `SplitterResizeTriggerIndicator` | `Splitter.ResizeTriggerIndicator` | A visual indicator rendered on the resize trigger (e.g., drag dots). |
| `SplitterResizeTriggerSeparator` | `Splitter.ResizeTriggerSeparator` | A separator line rendered on the resize trigger. |

## Props

### Splitter

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `orientation` | `"horizontal" \| "vertical"` | `"horizontal"` | The direction of the split. |
| `size` | `Array<{ id: string, size: number }>` | - | Controlled panel sizes. |
| `onSizeChange` | `(details: { size: Array }) => void` | - | Callback when panel sizes change. |
| `defaultSize` | `Array<{ id: string, size: number }>` | - | Default panel sizes. |

## Usage

### Basic Horizontal Splitter

```jsx
// Using nested property pattern (recommended)
<Splitter defaultSize={[{ id: "left", size: 50 }, { id: "right", size: 50 }]}>
  <Splitter.Panel id="left">
    <Box p="4">Left Panel</Box>
  </Splitter.Panel>
  <Splitter.ResizeTrigger id="left:right" />
  <Splitter.Panel id="right">
    <Box p="4">Right Panel</Box>
  </Splitter.Panel>
</Splitter>

// Using named exports (backward compatible)
<Splitter defaultSize={[{ id: "left", size: 50 }, { id: "right", size: 50 }]}>
  <SplitterPanel id="left">
    <Box p="4">Left Panel</Box>
  </SplitterPanel>
  <SplitterResizeTrigger id="left:right" />
  <SplitterPanel id="right">
    <Box p="4">Right Panel</Box>
  </SplitterPanel>
</Splitter>
```

### With Styled Resize Trigger

```jsx
<Splitter defaultSize={[{ id: "left", size: 50 }, { id: "right", size: 50 }]}>
  <SplitterPanel id="left">
    <Box p="4">Left Panel</Box>
  </SplitterPanel>
  <SplitterResizeTrigger id="left:right">
    <SplitterResizeTriggerSeparator />
    <SplitterResizeTriggerIndicator />
  </SplitterResizeTrigger>
  <SplitterPanel id="right">
    <Box p="4">Right Panel</Box>
  </SplitterPanel>
</Splitter>
```

### Vertical Splitter

```jsx
<Splitter
  orientation="vertical"
  defaultSize={[{ id: "top", size: 60 }, { id: "bottom", size: 40 }]}
>
  <SplitterPanel id="top">
    <Box p="4">Top Panel</Box>
  </SplitterPanel>
  <SplitterResizeTrigger id="top:bottom" />
  <SplitterPanel id="bottom">
    <Box p="4">Bottom Panel</Box>
  </SplitterPanel>
</Splitter>
```

### Three Panel Splitter

```jsx
<Splitter
  defaultSize={[
    { id: "sidebar", size: 20 },
    { id: "content", size: 60 },
    { id: "details", size: 20 },
  ]}
>
  <SplitterPanel id="sidebar">
    <Box p="4">Sidebar</Box>
  </SplitterPanel>
  <SplitterResizeTrigger id="sidebar:content" />
  <SplitterPanel id="content">
    <Box p="4">Main Content</Box>
  </SplitterPanel>
  <SplitterResizeTrigger id="content:details" />
  <SplitterPanel id="details">
    <Box p="4">Details</Box>
  </SplitterPanel>
</Splitter>
```
